query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A portrait of an elderly person with white hair wearing a dark coat with a wide collar and a brown strap across the shoulder, photographed against a plain light background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred portrait of an elderly person with white hair, rendered with extreme soft focus that dissolves facial features into indistinct smears. The entire image is suffused with muted, desaturated olive-gray tones that feel faded and melancholic. Details are almost completely lost—hair, fabric texture, and background collapse into a hazy, dreamlike atmosphere with no sharp edges or clear definition. Flat, diffused lighting eliminates shadows and depth, producing a ghostly, ethereal quality where the subject seems to emerge from and dissolve into the surrounding murk.
